# discord_guild_sticker (Resource)

A resource to manage a guild sticker.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_guild_sticker" "example" {
  server_id   = var.server_id
  name        = "wave"
  description = "Waving hello"
  tags        = "👋"
  file        = "${path.module}/assets/wave.png"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file` (String) Path to the sticker file. Must be PNG, APNG, GIF, or Lottie JSON. Max 512 KB.
- `name` (String) Name of the sticker (2-30 characters).
- `server_id` (String) ID of the guild to create the sticker in.
- `tags` (String) Autocomplete/suggestion tags for the sticker (max 200 characters).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the sticker (empty or 2-100 characters).

### Read-Only

- `format_type` (Number) Format type of the sticker (1=PNG, 2=APNG, 3=Lottie, 4=GIF).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
